violations.detail: The nvidia/cuda base image already includes CUDA userspace packages. Reinstalling them via the package manager is usually redundant and can introduce version drift between the base image CUDA stack and the newly installed packages.
violations.message: redundant CUDA package install on nvidia/cuda base image: cuda-toolkit

violations.detail: The nvidia/cuda base image already includes CUDA userspace packages. Reinstalling them via the package manager is usually redundant and can introduce version drift between the base image CUDA stack and the newly installed packages.
violations.message: redundant CUDA package install on nvidia/cuda base image: libcudnn8
violations.sourceCode: RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y libcudnn8

violations.detail: The nvidia/cuda base image already includes CUDA userspace packages. Reinstalling them via the package manager is usually redundant and can introduce version drift between the base image CUDA stack and the newly installed packages.
violations.message: redundant CUDA package install on nvidia/cuda base image: cuda-runtime-12-2
